title: Vibe Check: Claude Cowork Is Claude Code for the Rest of Us
title_zh: Vibe Check ： Claude Cowork是我们其他人的Claude准则
full_text: Anthropic just dropped Claude Cowork—essentially Claude Code for everyone, not just engineers—and we got to chat about it with a product engineer at Anthropic who helped build it.In this live Vibe Check, Dan Shipper and Kieran Klaassen explore the new interface together, testing what works (and what doesn't) in real time. Anthropic’s Felix Rieseberg joins midway through to explain the philosophy behind Cowork's design: why it separates "Tasks" from "Chats," how the qu
